title: Kind Lady
writer: Bernard Schubert, Edward Chodorov, Hugh Walpole
actors: Aline MacMahon, Basil Rathbone, Mary Carlisle
plot: Henry, a homeless artist, is invited in from the cold by Mary. Her kindness is exploited as Henry, his family and friends manipulate their way into living in her home. Mary tries to get rid of them, but they have their own scheme ...
